title: Senior Doctor - Sankara Nethralaya - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sankara Nethralaya - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!
